Name: Centre for Mindfulness Singapore
Tagline: Secular and Evidence-Based Mindfulness for Corporates, Schools and Public | Mindfulness Teacher Training | Accredited and Registered Mindfulness Training Provider | Mental Health |
About: Founded in 2015, the Centre for Mindfulness (Singapore) is an accredited leader in mindfulness education, dedicated to enhancing well-being, resilience, and personal growth. As a recognized training provider by the International Mindfulness Teachers Association (IMTA), we offer evidence-based mindfulness programs for individuals, schools, and organizations—empowering communities to lead healthier, more balanced lives.
Philosophy: The Centre for Mindfulness Singapore emphasizes a secular and evidence-based approach to mindfulness, fostering personal growth and resilience through structured programs.
Outcomes: Participants gain improved mental health, enhanced well-being, and greater resilience, enabling them to lead balanced lives.
Admissions: Enrollment is open to individuals, schools, and organizations through an online registration process. Visit the website for detailed program offerings and schedules.
Quote: Cultivate mindfulness to transform challenges into opportunities for growth, resilience, and enhanced well-being.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Centre for Mindfulness Singapore employs certified mindfulness teachers with IMTA accreditation and extensive experience in mindfulness practices. They utilize a structured, evidence-based approach to cater to diverse learning needs.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Centre provides comprehensive support through personalized mindfulness coaching and community-building activities. Regular check-ins and group sessions foster a nurturing environment, enhancing emotional resilience and mental clarity.
Performance.Academic Integration: Programs at the Centre incorporate mindfulness into educational settings, enhancing focus and emotional regulation. The curriculum includes workshops tailored for schools, promoting a balanced approach to learning and personal development.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of the Centre's programs often report improved mental clarity and resilience, aiding career advancement and personal growth. Many participants successfully integrate mindfulness into professional and academic pursuits.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Centre boasts serene meditation spaces and state-of-the-art audio-visual equipment for immersive learning experiences. Comfortable classrooms and a resource library support a conducive environment for mindfulness practice.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Progress is tracked through regular assessments and feedback sessions, ensuring continuous improvement and adaptation to individual needs. Stakeholders receive detailed reports on program effectiveness and participant development.
